code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut count = 0
mut in_token = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    in_token = false
  else
    if not in_token
      count = count + 1
      in_token = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let state_idx = count % 3
let name = match state_idx
when 0
  "Red"
when 1
  "Green"
when 2
  "Yellow"
when _
  "Red"
end
println(name)
